allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''angular-eslint''\); const rules = Object.keys\(p.tsPlugin?.rules || {}\); console.log\(''TS rules:'', JSON.stringify\(rules, null, 2\)\); const tplRules = Object.keys\(p.templatePlugin?.rules || {}\); console.log\(''Template rules:'', JSON.stringify\(tplRules, null, 2\)\);")
